zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Cage於大約1500年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，他的父親Thomas Cage17歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Parker17歲。他於大約1540年與Elizabeth Dale在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1583年6月8日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 勒 包福 安德 聖 潘可拉斯 索 萊恩 煙雨 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 宏尼 萊恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony Cage于大约1500年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，他的父亲Thomas Cage17岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Parker17岁。他于大约1540年与Elizabeth Dale在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1583年6月8日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 勒 包福 安德 聖 潘可拉斯 索 萊恩 煙雨 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 宏尼 萊恩。

nameMeanings.name: Cage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia): from Middle English, Old French cage ‘cage, enclosure’ (from Latin cavea ‘container, cave’), denoting someone who lived by or was the keeper of a cage, in the sense ‘lock-up, prison for petty offenders’.
English: alternatively, a variant of   Keech  .

variants.name: Keech
meanings: nickname for an fat person, from Middle English cach, caiche, cage, kech, a word of unexplained origin but presumably the antecedent of modern English dialect keech (variant catch) ‘lump of congealed fat; fat of a slaughtered animal rolled up into a lump (in preparation for sending to the chandler or tallow maker to make wax)’.
variant of Kedge, a nickname either from Middle English kegge, kigge ‘cheerful, pleasant, agreeable, merry’, or from an unrecorded Middle English kegge ‘belly’, for a pot-bellied person.

variants.name: Cager
meanings: English (Sussex): occupational name for a maker of cages or a jailer, Middle English cager (from Old French cagier), an agent derivative of Cage .
English: alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived by a cage, equivalent to atte Cage (see Cage ).

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Cage was born about 1500, in London, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Cage, was 17 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Parker, was 17. He married Elizabeth Dale about 1540, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 8 June 1583, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Cage est né environ 1500, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cage, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Parker, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dale environ 1540, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1583, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Cage um 1500 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cage 17 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Parker 17. Er hat um 1540 in London, Middlesex, England Elizabeth Dale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1583 im Alter von 84 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Cage è nato il circa 1500 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Cage, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Parker, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Dale circa 1540, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1583, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Cageが約1500年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Cageは17歳，母Lady Elizabeth Parkerは17歳であった。約1540年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでElizabeth Daleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1583年6月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト マリー ル ボウ アンド スト プアンクラス ソペル ラン ウィス アル ハロウズ ホーンエイ ランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Cage(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cage(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Parker(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1540년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Elizabeth Dale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1583년 6월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 일 보 앤드 스트 파크라스 소퍼 랜 위스 앨 핼로스 호니 랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Cage nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Cage, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Parker, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dale aproximadamente 1540, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1583, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary le Bow and St Pancras Soper Lane with All Hallows Honey Lane, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Cage родился около 1500 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Cage было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Parker, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dale около 1540 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 8 июня 1583 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри л боу анд ст панкрас сопир лан вит алл холлоус хоуни лан, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
